title: castanea mollissima
intro: Castanea mollissima, also known as the Chinese chestnut, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Castanea mollissima include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
